checklist.expectation: Dispatch targets the visible router session because recipient_role is router.
Router chooses or creates one worker session and sends the worker-mode dispatch prompt once.
Worker may use a subagent to create the tiny demo software under the temporary demo work directory.
If a worker or subagent needs login, approval, permission, or a TTY, it asks through the router rather than asking the user to open a subagent session.
The worker's final issue comment includes a codex-agent-v1 marker for the trigger fingerprint with status done, reassign_required, or authentication_blocked.
